char_overview: A justice-driven 游魂 who rejected the 狩灵协会 invitation. Optimistic and cheerful, she protects her hometown through 锈钟's unique brand of order.
char_looks: Brown long hair. Yellow eyes, bright and cheerful expression. Wearing a tight black vest and a puffy yellow jacket, with ripped jeans and sneakers on the lower half. Has a full-back clockwork tattoo. Expandable baton
char_flaws: Acts on emotion before strategy; Struggles with abstract reasoning.
char_abilities: 灵力回路-时泊之锚: Anchors spatial position while draining 灵力. Personal time accelerates, partially ignoring collision. Before 灵力 depletes, rewinds to anchor point with anything anchored by her 灵力.
char_mission: Protect Gunma Prefecture in her own way.
